original_query:
SELECT MIN(an.name) AS acress_pseudonym,
       MIN(t.title) AS japanese_anime_movie
FROM aka_name AS an,
     cast_info AS ci,
     company_name AS cn,
     movie_companies AS mc,
     name AS n,
     role_type AS rt,
     title AS t
WHERE ci.note ='(voice: English version)'
  AND cn.country_code ='[jp]'
  AND mc.note LIKE '%(Japan)%'
  AND mc.note NOT LIKE '%(USA)%'
  AND (mc.note LIKE '%(2006)%'
       OR mc.note LIKE '%(2007)%')
  AND n.name LIKE '%Yo%'
  AND n.name NOT LIKE '%Yu%'
  AND rt.role ='actress'
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2006 AND 2007
  AND (t.title LIKE 'One Piece%'
       OR t.title LIKE 'Dragon Ball Z%')
  AND an.person_id = n.id
  AND n.id = ci.person_id
  AND ci.movie_id = t.id
  AND t.id = mc.movie_id
  AND mc.company_id = cn.id
  AND ci.role_id = rt.id
  AND an.person_id = ci.person_id
  AND ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id
executed_query:
EXPLAIN SELECT MIN(an.name) AS acress_pseudonym,
       MIN(t.title) AS japanese_anime_movie
FROM aka_name AS an,
     cast_info AS ci,
     company_name AS cn,
     movie_companies AS mc,
     name AS n,
     role_type AS rt,
     title AS t
WHERE ci.note ='(voice: English version)'
  AND cn.country_code ='[jp]'
  AND mc.note LIKE '%(Japan)%'
  AND mc.note NOT LIKE '%(USA)%'
  AND (mc.note LIKE '%(2006)%'
       OR mc.note LIKE '%(2007)%')
  AND n.name LIKE '%Yo%'
  AND n.name NOT LIKE '%Yu%'
  AND rt.role ='actress'
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2006 AND 2007
  AND (t.title LIKE 'One Piece%'
       OR t.title LIKE 'Dragon Ball Z%')
  AND an.person_id = n.id
  AND n.id = ci.person_id
  AND ci.movie_id = t.id
  AND t.id = mc.movie_id
  AND mc.company_id = cn.id
  AND ci.role_id = rt.id
  AND an.person_id = ci.person_id
  AND ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id

->  Parallel Seq Scan on movie_companies mc  (cost=0.00..40566.74 rows=269 width=8)
->  Parallel Seq Scan on cast_info ci  (cost=0.00..441352.79 rows=43763 width=12)
->  Seq Scan on role_type rt  (cost=0.00..25.38 rows=6 width=4)

->  Index Scan using name_pkey on name n  (cost=0.43..0.77 rows=1 width=4)
->  Index Scan using title_pkey on title t  (cost=0.43..2.17 rows=1 width=21)
